title: Paget's disease of bone - NHS
text:
disease that are not related to Paget's disease of bone.
These include:
Paget's disease of the nipple or breast – a rare type of  breast cancer Paget's disease of the penis – a rare type of  penile cancer Paget's disease of the vulva – a rare type of  vulval cancer The general term "Paget's disease" is sometimes used to refer to Paget's disease of bone.
Video: Paget's disease 
In this video, an expert describes the various areas of the body that can be affected by Paget's disease.
